results.title: Bharat Value Fund Series VI (Fund Of Fund) — Sales Pitch (English)
results.content:
0% listed anchor/direct equity, capped at 49.9% per SEBI regulations.
- Track Record Across 3 Series: ~$1 billion AUM since April 2022 (domestic + offshore), 26 investments total, 100% adherence to PAT-positive, asset-backed, promoter-control filters in Series I.

Why Now — The Window:
- India IPO Window Wide Open: 119 IPOs managed by Wealth Company group over 40 years; current pipeline includes 2 DRHPs filed from Series I portfolio (Infrastructure, Home Appliances) — public market appetite for mid-market growth stories at multi-year highs.
- Pre-IPO Valuation Gap Compressing: Listed comparables trading 15–25% premium to unlisted peers; window to capture re-rating alpha narrowing as secondary markets discover these names — investors who wait forfeit the steepest part of the J-curve.
- Regulatory Tailwinds for Cat-II AIFs: SEBI's push for alternate capital to fuel mid-market scale-ups; listed exposure cap at 49.9% allows tactical liquidity without sacrificing core unlisted alpha — structural advantage vs.
